/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librobot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/robot_msg/librobot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/robot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_msg/msg/_speech_data_s.c.o CMakeFiles/robot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_msg/msg/_sound_location_s.c.o CMakeFiles/robot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_msg/msg/_processed_speech_s.c.o CMakeFiles/robot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_msg/msg/_sound_type_s.c.o CMakeFiles/robot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_msg/msg/_speaker_identity_s.c.o CMakeFiles/robot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_msg/msg/_extreme_sensor_alert_s.c.o CMakeFiles/robot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_msg/srv/_get_temperature_and_humidity_s.c.o CMakeFiles/robot_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_msg/srv/_cloud_command_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sunrise/TWStateMachine/build/robot_msg:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so librobot_msg__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so librobot_msg__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
